name: Pastry Cream- Great Chefs
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Hazelnut paste (optional - if difficult to find)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the sugar and eggs in a bowl until thick and lemon-yellow.
2. Add flour and beat until smooth.
3. Pour this mixture into scalded milk and beat while heating just to the boiling point.
4. Pour into a bowl placed over ice water (to cool the mixture) and add hazelnut paste.
5. Beat heavy cream with sugar until thick and fold into the cooled mixture.
